commands.name: branch

arguments.name: action
arguments.description:
Action: create, switch, list, clean, delete, or 
rename

arguments.name: name
arguments.description:
Branch name (for create/delete) or old name (for 
rename)

commands.description: Smart branch management (create, switch, list, clean).

commands.name: config
commands.description: Setup your AI provider and keys.

commands.name: merge

options.name: --ai
options.description: Use AI to generate merge commit message

options.name: --into
options.description:
Reverse merge: merge current branch into target 
(interactive if branch not specified)

arguments.name: branch
arguments.description:
Branch name - source in normal mode, target in --into 
mode

commands.description:
Merge branches with conflict detection and AI-powered 
messages.

options.name: --ai
options.description: Use AI to suggest a commit message.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Initialize the repository for the first time.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Check the current state of the repo.

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Pull latest changes and push your work.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Updates GitBuddy to the latest version from NuGet
